data.title: Hick’s Law
data.description: Simplifies choices on the user interface to reduce decision time.

data.title: Miller’s Law
data.description: Breaking information into chunks to enhance understanding.

data.title: Aesthetic-Usability Effect
data.description: Users perceive more aesthetically pleasing designs to be easier to use.
data.technical_spec: Consistent and visually appealing interface design.

data.title: Fitts’s Law
data.description: Designs interactive elements to be easily clickable.
data.technical_spec: Large buttons for key actions like 'Add to Cart'.

data.title: Jakob’s Law
data.description: Aligns with user expectations by conforming to standard web conventions.
data.technical_spec: Intuitive navigation similar to other e-commerce sites.
